title: Axiom Data Agent Input
description: Select a skill and action to run. Each skill provides different financial/research data.

action.title: Action
action.description: Action to perform. Examples: search, lookup, filings (SEC); top_protocols, yield_search (DeFi); balance, tokens, tx_history (Wallet); search, paper_detail (Paper); search, series, popular (Macro); search, patent_detail (Patent); overview, sentiment, trending (Token)

coinId.title: Coin ID
coinId.description: CoinGecko coin ID e.g. bitcoin, ethereum (Token Sentiment)

seriesId.title: FRED Series ID
seriesId.description: FRED series ID e.g. GDP, UNRATE (US Macro)

limit.title: Max Results
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
